prompt:
Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: character anchor illustration
Primary request: Create the core character anchor image for 阿鑫 / Axin, the default personal IP character of a Chinese and English AI content workflow brand.
Scene/backdrop: pure white background only.
Subject: 阿鑫 / Axin, a small matte black ink-stamp and toolbox hybrid workflow technician. Two tiny off-white screw-dot eyes, thin stick legs, short practical tool arms, an orange cable loop belt, and a small red warning tag. Serious deadpan expression, practical, slightly bizarre, not cute.
Style/medium: clean hand-drawn 2D illustration, minimalist black line art with very sparse orange and red accents, polished but still like a real sketch on white paper.
Composition/framing: centered full-body character, generous padding, square 1:1 canvas, no surrounding workflow scene.
Text: no text.
Constraints: no logo, no watermark, no extra character, no cute mascot look, no childish cartoon, no gradients, no shadow, no paper texture, no background objects.

Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: README example article illustration
Primary request: Generate one standalone 16:9 horizontal article illustration about turning messy project experience into reusable public content assets.
Scene/backdrop: pure white background.
Subject: 阿鑫 / Axin is operating a low-tech content workbench. On the left are messy project notes and terminal receipts. In the center, Axin presses them through a strange stamp-and-sieve machine. On the right, three clean asset blocks come out: README, 文章, 案例.
Style/medium: minimalist black hand-drawn line art, slightly wobbly pen lines, sparse orange path cable, tiny red warning tag, one blue system feedback note.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9, main subject occupies about half the canvas, large empty white margins, no title.
Text: handwritten labels only: "真实记录", "过筛", "压成资产", "可复用".
Constraints: Axin must perform the core action. Do not make a formal workflow diagram, PPT slide, corporate vector illustration, cute mascot poster, dense explainer, UI screenshot, or platform logo collage. No watermark.

Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: bilingual publishing matrix illustration
Primary request: Generate one standalone 16:9 horizontal article illustration showing one personal IP asset being adapted into Chinese publishing and English GitHub/agent discovery.
Scene/backdrop: pure white background.
Subject: 阿鑫 / Axin stands at a small switchboard with one source box labeled "真实项目". Axin plugs two orange cables into two output trays: one tray with Chinese content cards labeled "公众号" and "复盘", one tray with English-facing files labeled "README.en" and "llms.txt". Keep labels very sparse.
Style/medium: clean absurd hand-drawn workbench sketch, black line art, sparse orange cables, red caution tag, blue small agent signal.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9, simple two-branch layout but not a formal chart, lots of whitespace, no top-left title.
Text: handwritten labels only: "真实项目", "中文内容", "README.en", "llms.txt", "同一套资产".
Constraints: Axin must physically plug the cables. No logos, no flags, no dense table, no PPT infographic, no extra mascot, no gradient, no shadow, no watermark.

Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: GEO and LLM discovery illustration
Primary request: Generate one standalone 16:9 horizontal article illustration about making a repository discoverable by humans and LLM agents.
Scene/backdrop: pure white background.
Subject: 阿鑫 / Axin is inspecting a small conveyor with four file cards: README, docs, llms.txt, examples. A hand-drawn magnifying glass on a little stand points to a small blue agent node. Axin stamps a red check tag on the file stack.
Style/medium: minimalist black hand-drawn line art, sparse orange flow line, red check/warning tag, blue agent signal, clean white paper feel without paper texture.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9, asymmetric but balanced, lots of whitespace, no title.
Text: handwritten labels only: "README", "docs", "llms.txt", "examples", "可发现".
Constraints: Make it look like a strange content QA bench, not SEO dashboard, not search results page, not PPT, not UI screenshot. Axin performs the inspection. No logos, no watermark.

Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: repository review illustration
Primary request: Generate one standalone 16:9 horizontal article illustration about deep repository self-review before publishing.
Scene/backdrop: pure white background.
Subject: 阿鑫 / Axin sits at a tiny audit desk with a magnifier, a checklist, and a pile of files. Axin is crossing out stale labels and stamping clean ones. Around the desk are small file tabs: paths, names, snapshots, scripts, images, tests.
Style/medium: black hand-drawn line art, slightly wobbly, sparse orange connectors, red stale-label marks, one blue validation stamp.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9, dense enough to feel like review work but still clean, at least 35 percent blank white space, no top-left title.
Text: handwritten labels only: "命名", "路径", "快照", "脚本", "图片", "校验".
Constraints: Axin must actively audit and relabel the files. Do not create a generic code screen, dashboard, flowchart, PPT, cute mascot image, or busy wall of text. No watermark.
